Home > Talend Studio User Guide

What is Talend Studio?

Talend Studio is a graphical job design tool used to build data integration jobs. It supports a range of subscription licenses.

Getting started

You can start by creating a project.

Information note Note: Qlik Talend Cloud Premium Edition requires Talend Studio 8.0.1 R2024-05 or higher.

Subsection

Some subsection content.

Information note Restriction: Not available in the Europe (Paris) region.
